offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 expense reports/month, inefficient tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense reporting instead of manual spreadsheets or basic expense tracking apps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking solutions

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
